'''âr-g-m-p''' ('''karagmepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackal|jackal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackal|jackal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-g-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| karagmepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiragmepoko|thiragmepoko]] || [[word:jiragmepoko|jiragmepoko]] || [[word:shiragmepoko|shiragmepoko]] || [[word:kiragmepoko|kiragmepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠragmepoko|thĂŠragmepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠragmepoko|jĂŠragmepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠragmepoko|shĂŠragmepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠragmepoko|kĂŠragmepoko]]

|}
